ddls:
CREATE TABLE "award_shows" (
  "award_show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the award show */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award show took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the award show */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location of the award show */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the award show */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the award show */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the award show */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time the award show was published */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the award show was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Record Of The Year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., music, video) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominee */,
  "award_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award show the nominee belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the nominee belongs to */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song or work nominated */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist or nominee */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the nominee won the award */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the nomination was submitted */,
  "nomination_status" TEXT /* Current status of the nomination */,
  "nominee_type" TEXT /* Type of nominee (e.g., artist, group, band) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_award_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_show_id") REFERENCES award_shows ("award_show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee the producer belongs to */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "producer_type" TEXT /* Type of producer (e.g., music, video) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Producer's contact information (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_producers_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., profile picture, cover photo) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "award_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award show the voter belongs to */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "voter_type" TEXT /* Type of voter (e.g., music industry professional, fan) */,
  "voting_history" TEXT /* Voter's voting history (e.g., a list of past votes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter who cast the vote */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee the vote was cast for */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., initial vote, final vote) */,
  "voting_round" INTEGER /* Round of voting (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, voter, nominee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (expanded to include more granular permissions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
